caption:
Women's looks of the week!

As the island awakens with vibrant energy, we’re embracing the lightness of linen and the joy of bold hues. These looks of the week are our invitation to step into summer with confidence—flowing silk, crisp stripes, and textures that breathe with the Balearic breeze. Let’s welcome this season together, one unforgettable outfit at a time.

Silk Dress: @agenciesturquoise
Bags: @epiceparis
Red Stripe Combo: @diega_paris
Linen Pants, Shirt, and Jacket: @lurdesbergada_syngmancucala
Hats: @kangol
